watch_reasons: White liquor deserves attention but long-term growth is not optimistic; only the largest leaders justify continued attention.

calibrated_standard_implications: Baijiu watchlist should be restricted to the strongest national or category leaders with durable brand and channel power.

peer_groups: 金融-银行-股份制与城商行
watch_reasons: Accepted. It is the A-share bank quality anchor because its retail wealth management core deposits customer franchise and risk culture are hard to replicate.
calibrated_standard_implications: Bank core watch requires a differentiated liability base customer ecosystem risk culture and business model that are hard for another funded player to replicate.

peer_groups: 金融-银行-股份制与城商行
watch_reasons: Accepted. It is retained as a differentiated city-bank sample rather than as a weaker copy of China Merchants Bank.
calibrated_standard_implications: City banks can be retained when SME service private-business relationships risk selection and regional operating culture create a separate hard-to-replace franchise.

peer_groups: 金融-银行-股份制与城商行
watch_reasons: Accepted. The postal network down-market customer base and deposit franchise are accepted as a distinct moat even though profitability quality is lower than China Merchants Bank.
calibrated_standard_implications: A bank can be retained for a unique low-cost deposit and distribution network when that network is not covered by the retained retail wealth-management leader.

peer_groups: 金融-银行-股份制与城商行
watch_reasons: Accepted. The microloan and small-business bank model is accepted as a distinct niche that should be observed separately from national banks and larger city banks.
calibrated_standard_implications: Small regional banks can be retained when their microloan underwriting local information and risk-control model are the core thesis rather than simple regional credit beta.

peer_groups: 电池材料与镍钴资源一体化
watch_reasons: Retained. 华友钴业 is a cross-resource and battery-material integration platform. The relevant risk is metal price and technology-route cycle; not easy replication by another battery-material peer.
calibrated_standard_implications: Resource-backed battery-material integration can qualify when resources; metallurgy; customers; and project execution reinforce each other.

peer_groups: 电池材料与镍钴资源一体化
watch_reasons: Retained. 中伟新材 is kept as the pCAM and nickel-cobalt precursor anchor. The low-margin nature is a risk but not enough to reject because its position is not just generic capacity.
calibrated_standard_implications: Thin-margin material leaders can qualify only when scale; process; customer qualification; and resource security are all present.

peer_groups: 电池材料与镍钴资源一体化
watch_reasons: Retained with monitoring. 格林美 is not retained as a stronger precursor peer than 中伟; it is retained for recycling and closed-loop resource recovery. The watch thesis fails if CATL; Huayou; or other giants capture the recycling feedstock channels and compress its economics.
calibrated_standard_implications: Recycling can qualify when channel control; compliance; processing know-how; and customer closed-loop value are material. Low margin alone is not a rejection if the network is hard to replicate.

peer_groups: 电池材料与镍钴资源一体化
watch_reasons: Retained. 天赐材料 is the electrolyte anchor. LiPF6 cyclicality and price compression must be monitored but the company is not merely generic low-margin capacity.
calibrated_standard_implications: Electrolyte companies qualify only when formulation; core lithium salts; additives; cost process; and customer qualification are source-backed.

peer_groups: 电池材料与镍钴资源一体化
watch_reasons: Retained. 新宙邦 is not kept as a smaller 天赐; it is kept as a specialty-chemistry and additives platform. The margin profile supports that this is not merely a low-value business that larger peers ignore.
calibrated_standard_implications: Specialty additives and fluorochemicals can justify a second electrolyte-related watch company when margin quality and formulation/process difficulty are visible.

peer_groups: 电池材料与镍钴资源一体化
watch_reasons: Retained. 恩捷股份 is the wet separator anchor. It should be monitored for price recovery and overseas execution; but separator scale and qualification are not easily recreated by capital alone.
calibrated_standard_implications: High-barrier steps can remain watchable during margin troughs if process and customer evidence remain strong.

peer_groups: 电池材料与镍钴资源一体化
watch_reasons: Retained with lower conviction. 星源材质 is kept as a dry-separator specialist. It is not allowed to duplicate 恩捷's wet-separator slot; future review must confirm dry separator economics and customer durability.
calibrated_standard_implications: A second company in the same material step can qualify only if its process route and customer use case differ materially from the first retained leader.

peer_groups: 电池材料与镍钴资源一体化
watch_reasons: Retained. 璞泰来 is kept for coated separator and battery-material platform integration rather than pure anode volume.
calibrated_standard_implications: Platform-material companies qualify when several steps create customer co-development; process learning; and margin quality rather than unfocused breadth.

peer_groups: 电池材料与镍钴资源一体化
watch_reasons: Retained. 贝特瑞 is the anode anchor. It should be monitored against cost specialists but still has the strongest technology and volume evidence in the group.
calibrated_standard_implications: Anode leaders qualify when volume leadership is paired with product iteration and customer validation rather than just graphitization capacity.

peer_groups: 电池材料与镍钴资源一体化
watch_reasons: Retained with lower conviction. 尚太科技 is kept as an artificial-graphite cost-curve specialist. If deeper review shows cost advantage is temporary utilization or energy-price benefit rather than process capability; remove it.
calibrated_standard_implications: Cost leadership can qualify as a moat when margins and ROE prove the cost curve is economically meaningful through competition.

peer_groups: 电池材料与镍钴资源一体化
watch_reasons: Retained. 湖南裕能 is the LFP scale anchor. It is not a high-margin specialty material company; the watch reason is scale plus upstream resource and process consistency.
calibrated_standard_implications: Commodity-like cathode leaders qualify only when scale and upstream integration support cost and supply advantages that weaker peers cannot easily match.

peer_groups: 电池材料与镍钴资源一体化
watch_reasons: Retained. 当升科技 is kept as the high-end cathode and solid-state-material watch case. Its moat is customer-validated product development; not generic cathode capacity.
calibrated_standard_implications: High-end cathode and solid-state material companies can qualify with moderate margins when technical difficulty and customer validation are credible.

peer_groups: 医药生物-CXO与医药研发外包
watch_reasons: Retained. 药明康德 is the CXO anchor. BIOSECURE and U.S. exposure cap confidence but do not erase the hard-to-replicate platform.
calibrated_standard_implications: CXO core watch requires end-to-end project continuity; quality systems; global delivery; and customer trust rather than lab capacity alone.

peer_groups: 医药生物-CXO与医药研发外包
watch_reasons: Retained. 康龙化成 is not treated as a weak copy of 药明康德 because its lab-to-CMC conversion and clinical/CDMO breadth create a separate platform thesis.
calibrated_standard_implications: Integrated CXO platforms can qualify when platform breadth and project conversion are visible even if they are smaller than the global leader.

peer_groups: 医药生物-CXO与医药研发外包
watch_reasons: Retained. 凯莱英 is the high-margin small-molecule CDMO anchor and should be monitored for customer cycle and emerging-modality execution.
calibrated_standard_implications: High-value CDMO watch requires process know-how; quality system; commercial project history; and evidence that work is not generic manufacturing capacity.

peer_groups: 医药生物-CXO与医药研发外包
watch_reasons: Retained with monitoring. 泰格医药 is kept as the clinical CRO network leader. Margin pressure and investment-income volatility should be tracked but the clinical network is a real moat.
calibrated_standard_implications: Clinical CRO can qualify when hospital/site network; data capability; MRCT delivery; and sponsor trust are source-backed. Low-end SMO labor alone should not qualify.

peer_groups: 医药生物-CXO与医药研发外包
watch_reasons: Retained with lower conviction. 九洲药业 is not stronger than 凯莱英 but has enough specialized API/CDMO depth and cash conversion to deserve observation.
calibrated_standard_implications: Specialized CDMO/API companies can qualify beside larger anchors when process depth; regulatory quality; project pipeline; and margins prove a differentiated niche.

peer_groups: 医药生物-CXO与医药研发外包
watch_reasons: Retained. 皓元医药 is kept as a front-end molecular-building-block and tool-compound platform rather than as a smaller generic CDMO.
calibrated_standard_implications: Front-end molecule platforms can qualify when SKU breadth; synthesis know-how; customer/citation flywheel; and high-margin front-end economics are visible.

peer_groups: 医药生物-CXO与医药研发外包
watch_reasons: Retained with lower conviction. 阳光诺和 is kept as a high-margin domestic drug R&D service platform. The thesis fails if revenue proves to be mainly replaceable generic-drug outsourcing.
calibrated_standard_implications: Domestic pharmaceutical R&D service platforms can qualify when economics and order/customer evidence show differentiated technical capability rather than simple execution labor.

peer_groups: 电气设备-电源设备-动力电池与新能源车平台
watch_reasons: Accepted. CATL is the global power-battery leader; price war and cyclicality should be risk tags rather than rejection reasons.
calibrated_standard_implications: Core watch requires global leadership plus hard-to-replicate customer validation manufacturing scale safety record product breadth and technology iteration.

peer_groups: 电气设备-电源设备-动力电池与新能源车平台
watch_reasons: Accepted. BYD should remain watch because vertical integration battery capability cost engineering and vehicle-platform scale create differentiated capability.
calibrated_standard_implications: Integrated platform watch can include a vehicle company when vertical integration creates durable cost supply-chain and product-cycle advantages.

peer_groups: 电子设备-红外热成像与特种光电感知
watch_reasons: Retained. 睿创微纳 is the infrared detector and multi-dimensional sensing anchor. It is not merely a hardware manufacturer because chip; module; algorithm; terminal; and scenario expansion reinforce each other.
calibrated_standard_implications: In infrared thermal imaging retain platform companies when chip-level capability; high-margin productization; R&D intensity; and broad customer use prove a hard-to-replicate technology moat.

peer_groups: 电子设备-红外热成像与特种光电感知
watch_reasons: Retained. 高德红外 is kept beside 睿创微纳 because its whole-chain complete-equipment and high-end system-integration position is differentiated from a detector-led platform thesis.
calibrated_standard_implications: Keep multiple infrared leaders only when one company is detector/platform-led and another has source-backed complete-system or equipment integration advantages.

peer_groups: 有色金属-锂资源与锂盐 | 有色金属-战略资源与矿业
watch_reasons: Accepted. Salt Lake is retained as the domestic salt-lake potassium and lithium anchor. Its moat comes from Qarhan salt-lake resource access; high margins; brine and mining-right constraints; and a role not covered by hard-rock lithium peers. | Retained. Salt Lake is not a global potash monopoly. It has a hard-to-replicate domestic strategic-resource position in Qarhan salt-lake potash and salt-lake lithium; very high 2025 margins; large mining-right area after resource integration; and capacity constrained by scarce brine resources and permits.
calibrated_standard_implications: Domestic salt-lake lithium and potassium platforms can qualify without global monopoly when resource access is scarce; margins are structurally supported; and the advantage is not mainly lithium-price beta. | A domestic monopoly or near-monopoly can qualify when the mineral is import-sensitive; resource access is scarce; margins are structurally high; and the advantage is not mainly commodity-price beta.

peer_groups: 有色金属-锂资源与锂盐
watch_reasons: Accepted. Tianqi is retained for Greenbushes-backed hard-rock lithium resource quality and lithium-chemical capability. Lithium cyclicality is a monitoring risk not a reason to exclude it.
calibrated_standard_implications: World-class hard-rock lithium resource exposure should be retained even when current profit is cyclical or temporarily weak.

peer_groups: 有色金属-锂资源与锂盐
watch_reasons: Accepted. Ganfeng is retained for its global lithium-resource portfolio; lithium-chemical process platform; and differentiated integration model. It is not a weaker copy of Tianqi because its advantage is broader resource and processing optionality rather than one single best mine.
calibrated_standard_implications: Retain multiple lithium leaders when the resource forms; geography; processing capability; and customer or project optionality are meaningfully different.

peer_groups: 有色金属-锂资源与锂盐
watch_reasons: Accepted. Sinomine is retained because Bikita; Tanco; cesium; rubidium; and geological exploration capability create a scarce-resource angle not covered by Tianqi; Ganfeng; or Salt Lake.
calibrated_standard_implications: Rare-light-metal and lithium resource platforms can be retained when company-level resource ownership and exploration or reserve-expansion capability are source-backed.

peer_groups: 有色金属-锂资源与锂盐
watch_reasons: Revised to watch after reviewer challenge. In a lithium-only comparison Zangge is weaker than Salt Lake; however at listed-company level it combines potash cash flow; salt-lake lithium optionality; a material Julong Copper stake whose 2025 investment income dominated profit; and Zijin's new controlling-shareholder role. This cross-resource package is hard to replicate and deserves observation while risks from copper price beta; equity-method earnings; and less direct operating control than Zijin must be tracked.
calibrated_standard_implications: A company rejected inside a narrow peer group must be rechecked for cross-industry scarce-resource assets or controlling-shareholder capability. Retain it if the aggregate listed-company thesis is material; hard to replicate; and not merely a weaker copy of a retained single-industry peer.

peer_groups: 有色金属-锂资源与锂盐
watch_reasons: Retained with lower conviction. Rongjie owns the Kangding Jiajika No.134 spodumene mining right; has formed 1.05 million tonnes per year open-pit mining capacity and 450 thousand tonnes per year ore-processing capacity; and the local financial data show strong 2025 margins. It is not a global anchor but gives the watchlist a distinct domestic in-production hard-rock lithium asset.
calibrated_standard_implications: A domestic hard-rock lithium company can qualify when the mine is already in production; margins support resource economics; capacity is constrained by mining rights or processing expansion; and the role is not merely lithium-salt conversion capacity.

peer_groups: 医药生物-医疗器械-高端医械与医疗器械平台
watch_reasons: Accepted. Mindray is the broadest A-share medical-device platform; short-term procurement or policy pressure should be risk-tagged rather than used as a rejection reason.
calibrated_standard_implications: Core medical-device platform watch requires product breadth hospital validation installed base service network global channel and continuous product iteration.

peer_groups: 医药生物-医疗器械-高端医械与医疗器械平台
watch_reasons: Accepted. United Imaging has a distinct high-end imaging platform that Mindray does not comprehensively cover.
calibrated_standard_implications: High-end imaging leaders can be retained alongside broad device platforms when the equipment category and clinical validation path are meaningfully different.

peer_groups: 医药生物-医疗器械-高端医械与医疗器械平台
watch_reasons: Accepted. Electrophysiology and vascular-intervention consumables are a distinct high-value clinical niche with doctor adoption and recurring procedure demand.
calibrated_standard_implications: Specialized high-value device leaders can be retained when their treatment pathway and doctor adoption are not covered by retained broad platforms.

peer_groups: 医药生物-医疗器械-高端医械与医疗器械平台
watch_reasons: Retain. Aortic and peripheral vascular intervention is a specialized high-value device niche distinct from Mindray United Imaging and Apt Medical; current evidence shows growth cash flow and clinical/product specialization.
calibrated_standard_implications: Keep specialized intervention-device companies when their clinical niche is hard to replace and not comprehensively dominated by retained peers.

peer_groups: 医药生物-医疗器械-高端医械与医疗器械平台
watch_reasons: Retain. Endoscopic diagnosis-and-treatment consumables have recurring procedure demand doctor usage habits and a different clinical workflow from retained equipment platforms.
calibrated_standard_implications: Keep specialized consumable leaders when the procedure workflow creates durable adoption and the retained platforms do not cover the same advantage.

peer_groups: 电子设备-半导体设备
watch_reasons: Accepted. It is the A-share semiconductor-equipment platform anchor.
calibrated_standard_implications: Core semiconductor-equipment platform leaders should be retained when they combine multi-process coverage with customer validation and recurring tool-service learning.

peer_groups: 电子设备-半导体设备
watch_reasons: Accepted. It is not a weaker copy of Naura because etch and high-end process validation are separate advantages.
calibrated_standard_implications: Retain separate leaders for different front-end process steps when each step has hard qualification barriers and strong process know-how.

peer_groups: 电子设备-半导体设备
watch_reasons: Accepted. CMP is a separate core process step rather than a weaker version of etch or platform equipment.
calibrated_standard_implications: Retain single-process leaders when the process step is indispensable and the company has strong share or installed-base evidence.

peer_groups: 电子设备-半导体设备
watch_reasons: Retain. It is a distinct process-step leader and not covered by Naura or AMEC.
calibrated_standard_implications: Thin-film deposition leaders should be retained separately from etch and CMP leaders when customer qualification and process coverage are evidenced.

peer_groups: 电子设备-半导体设备
watch_reasons: Retain. It has stronger process moat and margin quality than mixed wet-process or system-integration peers.
calibrated_standard_implications: Cleaning and wet-process leaders should be retained when they show differentiated technology and high-value equipment economics.

peer_groups: 电子设备-半导体设备
watch_reasons: Retain. Its profitability and moat strength are both materially stronger than ordinary back-end equipment companies.
calibrated_standard_implications: ATE leaders can be retained alongside front-end process equipment when they show platform economics and durable installed-base effects.

peer_groups: 电子设备-半导体设备
watch_reasons: Retain. It is not fully dominated by Huafeng because handlers and probers add a different platform angle.
calibrated_standard_implications: Testing-equipment companies can be retained together when one has stronger ATE platform economics and another has broader handler or probe-station coverage.

peer_groups: 电子设备-半导体设备
watch_reasons: Retain. This is exactly the type of current-profitability-low but high-barrier equipment company that should enter observation.
calibrated_standard_implications: For metrology and inspection equipment use gross margin and product-validation progress more than short-term net margin when judging moat quality.

peer_groups: 电子设备-半导体设备
watch_reasons: Retain with monitoring. Keep it because metrology is scarce and the HBM or advanced-memory contract evidence is meaningful, while tracking semiconductor-business purity.
calibrated_standard_implications: Retain mixed-platform equipment companies only when the high-barrier semiconductor segment has concrete customer or contract evidence.

peer_groups: 电子设备-半导体设备
watch_reasons: Retain with lower conviction. The moat is weaker than the core leaders but the process step is scarce enough for observation.
calibrated_standard_implications: Lithography-track and coating-developing equipment can enter watch when customer orders and process scarcity are evidenced, even if current net margin is depressed.

peer_groups: 有色金属-战略资源与矿业
watch_reasons: Accepted. Zijin is a global mine-development anchor with copper-gold resource depth; project execution; and cross-border operating capability. Cyclicality is a monitoring risk not a reason to exclude it.
calibrated_standard_implications: Global mine developers with scarce reserves; repeatable development capability; and meaningful international position should outrank large smelting or processing platforms.

peer_groups: 有色金属-战略资源与矿业
watch_reasons: Accepted. CMOC is retained for differentiated copper-cobalt-molybdenum-tungsten-niobium resources; international mine operation; and strong cash generation.
calibrated_standard_implications: Multiple resource companies can be retained when their resource portfolios and mine-development capabilities are meaningfully different and not weak copies of each other.

peer_groups: 有色金属-战略资源与矿业
watch_reasons: Accepted. Rare-earth quota; resource access; separation and materials position create a strategic-resource moat even though earnings remain price and policy cyclical.
calibrated_standard_implications: For rare earths country-level supply concentration can support watchlist inclusion only when the listed company also has company-level quota; resource; separation; or material-chain control.

peer_groups: 有色金属-战略资源与矿业
watch_reasons: Accepted. Tin and indium resource leadership; global tin share; and integrated mining-smelting-processing support direct watchlist inclusion.
calibrated_standard_implications: Strategic small-metal leaders can be retained when company-level market share or resource reserve evidence is strong enough even if earnings remain commodity-cyclical.

peer_groups: 有色金属-战略资源与矿业
watch_reasons: Retained. Xiamen Tungsten is not a pure miner but tungsten is globally supply-concentrated and China applies mining quota controls. The company has an integrated tungsten-molybdenum chain; meaningful upstream self-supply; strong tungsten-molybdenum margins; and globally competitive molybdenum and tungsten material positions.
calibrated_standard_implications: For tungsten retain differentiated companies when resource constraint; quota control; high-value processing; and strong step-level margins are all present. Pure mining status is not required if the processing moat is resource-backed.

peer_groups: 有色金属-战略资源与矿业
watch_reasons: Retained. China Tungsten High-Tech has stronger company-level evidence than a normal material processor. Its annual report describes Shizhuyuan as the world's largest single operating tungsten mine and public disclosures identify its cemented-carbide scale as global No. 1. Margins and R&D intensity are acceptable for high-end tungsten materials.
calibrated_standard_implications: Keep both Xiamen Tungsten and China Tungsten High-Tech because they are differentiated. Xiamen Tungsten is an integrated tungsten-molybdenum and material platform while China Tungsten High-Tech is a hard-alloy tooling and Shizhuyuan-backed tungsten platform.
